title: Weekly horoscope
metaTitle: Weekly Horoscope — All 12 Moon Signs Free | Taara Jyotishyam
metaDescription: This week's free horoscope for all 12 Moon signs — work, relationships, health, and what's ahead. Fresh forecast every week in six Indian languages.
subtitle: Your Moon sign moves through life's themes week by week — relationships, work, health, and what the current planetary alignments bring. More personal than a sun sign prediction, more immediate than your birth chart.
disclaimer: This is a Moon sign forecast — based on your Chandra rashi (Moon sign at birth), not your sun sign. For a reading grounded in your full chart — lagna, all nine planets, and your current dasha period — get your personalised reading on the home page.
